text: The markets, understandably, still have not gotten used to the onboarding of tariffs and then the offboarding of tariffs. It is very difficult, of course, for investors, consumers, for businesses cross border to determine whether their investments and their purchasing power is going to be impacted continually over the next several months. Suffice it to say that it is not a surprise that the Trump administration appealed the order of the international trade judges in United States, and one would expect these appeals will probably go all the way to the Supreme Court.
